nasb.text: And now, behold, I am going to my people; come, and I will advise you what this people will do to your people in the days to come.”

esv.text: And now, behold, I am going to my people. Come, I will let you know what this people will do to your people in the latter days.”

cnv.text: 現在我要回我本族去了；你來，我要告訴你這個民族日後要怎樣待你的人民。”

ccb.text: 现在我要回本族去了。但我要告诉你日后以色列人会怎样对待你的人民。”
